name: Denji | FIRST MEETING
description:

✧･ﾟ: ✧･ﾟ:

***SUMMARY***╰┈➤ *dennis is a young inexperienced devil hunter, eager to get better at his occupation. one day, makima calls him into her office. expecting to get something sexual out of the interaction with her, she tells denji she wants him to meet a devil hunter. curious, denji finds himself interested to meet this mysterious hunter. who knows, maybe they could teach him a thing or two?*
